modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Applications needing VPN access when working remotely from off-campus.

full_description_text:  
I am currently working remotely and need to know which applications require a VPN connection when I am off-campus. It’s important for me to understand this because I want to ensure I can access everything I need without any interruptions. I have been trying to figure this out, but the information isn’t clear, and I want to avoid any issues while working. Please provide a detailed list of those applications that necessitate a VPN connection for remote access.
short_description: Applications needing VPN access when working remotely from off-campus.
